languages.text: Eo-gann can use {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} on enemies, lowering his Resolve by 100% for 1 round. The targeted enemy immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). After that, it has all stats lowered by {uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}. {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Stunned for 1 round unless it is one of the powerful enemies. Non-{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Perplexed, instead. Each enemy can be affected by this ability only once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eo-gann can use {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} on enemies, lowering his Resolve by 100% for 1 round. The targeted enemy immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). After that, it has all stats lowered by {uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}. {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Stunned for 1 round. Non-{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Perplexed, instead. Each enemy can be affected by this ability only once per combat.

languages.text:
Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g}. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it suffers +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.
languages.original_text: Eo-gann can use {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} on enemies, lowering his Resolve by 100% for 1 round. The targeted enemy immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). After that, it has all stats lowered by {uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}. {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Stunned for 1 round unless it is one of the powerful enemies. Non-{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Metallicized{/g} enemy is Perplexed, instead. Each enemy can be affected by this ability only once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). After that, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all characteristics. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes stunned for 1 round. A target not affected by it becomes perplexed for 1 round instead.
Each target can be affected by this ability only once per combat.

Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g}. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it suffers +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.

Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all characteristics. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes stunned for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it becomes perplexed for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.

languages.text:
Эоганн может выбрать противника целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} Эоганна снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Цель немедленно атакует ближайшее существо (в первую очередь выбирая других противников), а затем получает −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}. Если цель находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g} и не является особым сильным врагом, она получает {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушение{/g} на 1 раунд. Если цель не находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, она вместо этого получает +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g} на 1 раунд.
Противник не может стать целью этой способности больше одного раза за бой.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g}. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it suffers +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Эоганн может нацелить способность {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Добей его!{/g} на противников. В этом случае его решимость снижается на −100% на 1 раунд.
Цель немедленно атакует ближайшее существо (приоритет — другие противники). Затем цель получает −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} ко всем характеристикам. Цель под эффектом {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Феррум Санктум{/g} получает оглушение на 1 раунд. Цель без этого эффекта вместо этого получает замешательство на 1 раунд.
Каждая цель может быть поражена этой способностью только один раз за бой.

Эоганн может выбрать противника целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} Эоганна снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Цель немедленно атакует ближайшее существо (в первую очередь выбирая других противников), а затем получает −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}. Если цель находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g} и не является особым сильным врагом, она получает {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушение{/g} на 1 раунд. Если цель не находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, она получает {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательство{/g} на 1 раунд.
Противник не может стать целью этой способности больше одного раза за бой.

Эоганн может выбрать противника целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} Эоганна снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Цель немедленно атакует ближайшее существо (в первую очередь выбирая других противников), а затем получает −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}. Если цель находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g} и не является особым сильным врагом, она получает {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушение{/g} на 1 раунд. Если цель не находится под воздействием {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, она получает {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательство{/g} на 1 раунд.
Противник не может стать целью этой способности больше одного раза за бой.

languages.text:
Eogunn puede afectar a enemigos con la capacidad {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}¡Derribadlo!{/g}. En ese caso, su {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} se reduce un −100 % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
El objetivo ataca inmediatamente a la criatura más cercana (dando prioridad a otros enemigos). Después, el objetivo sufre −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} a todas sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g}. Si el objetivo está afectado por {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, además queda {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdido{/g} durante 1 asalto, salvo que se trate de un enemigo muy poderoso. En ese caso, queda {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g} durante 1 asalto.
Cada objetivo solo puede verse afectado por esta capacidad una vez por combate.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g}. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it suffers +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn puede afectar a enemigos con la capacidad {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}¡Derribadlo!{/g}. En ese caso, su {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} se reduce un −100 % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
El objetivo ataca inmediatamente a la criatura más cercana (dando prioridad a otros enemigos). Después, el objetivo sufre −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} a todas sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g}. Si el objetivo está afectado por {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, además queda {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdido{/g} durante 1 asalto, salvo que se trate de un enemigo muy poderoso. En ese caso, queda {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g} durante 1 asalto.
Cada objetivo solo puede verse afectado por esta capacidad una vez por combate.

languages.text:
Eogunn kann Ziele mit der Fähigkeit {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring es zu Ende!{/g} anvisieren. In diesem Fall wird seine {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −100 % reduziert.
Das Ziel attackiert sofort die nächstgelegene Kreatur (und priorisiert dabei Gegner). Anschließend hat das Ziel −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} auf alle {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g}. Ein mit {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegtes Ziel wird 1 Runde lang {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g}, wenn es kein mächtiger Gegner ist. Nicht damit belegte Ziele sind stattdessen 1 Runde lang +1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}verblüfft{/g}.
Jedes Ziel kann pro Kampf nur einmal durch diese Fähigkeit beeinflusst werden.

Eogunn kann Ziele mit der Fähigkeit {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring es zu Ende!{/g} anvisieren. In diesem Fall wird seine {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −100 % reduziert.

Jedes Ziel kann pro Kampf nur einmal durch diese Fähigkeit beeinflusst werden.

languages.text:
Eogunn peut viser des ennemis avec la capacité {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Descendez-le !{/g}, auquel cas sa {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} est réduite de -100 % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
La cible attaque immédiatement la créature la plus proche, en visant un autre ennemi en priorité. Ensuite, elle subit une pénalité de −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} à toutes ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g}. Les cibles sous l'effet de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} sont {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdies{/g} pendant 1 round, sauf s'il s'agit d'un ennemi puissant. Les cibles sans cet effet subissent +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g} pendant 1 round.
Chaque cible ne peut être affectée par cette capacité qu'une fois par combat.

La cible attaque immédiatement la créature la plus proche, en visant un autre ennemi en priorité. Chaque cible ne peut être affectée par cette capacité qu'une fois par combat.

languages.text:
Eogunn, {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Yere Ser!{/g} kabiliyeti ile düşmanları hedefleyebilir. Bu durumda {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri, %100 azalır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Hedef, anında en yakındaki yaratığa saldırır (diğer düşmanlara öncelik verir). Ardından hedef, tüm {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerine{/g} −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} puan alır. Hedef, {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} etkisindeyse ve güçlü bir düşman değilse {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemler{/g}. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Bu etkiden muzdarip olmayan hedef ise bunun yerine +1 {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine uğrar. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.
Her hedef, bir çatışmada bu kabiliyetten yalnızca bir kez etkilenebilir.

languages.text:
伊奥贡可对敌人使用{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}把它干掉！{/g}能力。在这种情况下，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降低100%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
目标立即攻击最近的生物（优先攻击其他敌人）。之后，目标所有{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}降低{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}点。受{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}影响的目标陷入{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}状态，持续1轮，除非这是一名强大的敌人。未受钢铁圣所影响的目标则承受1层{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}效果，持续1轮。
每个目标每场战斗只能受此能力影响一次。

A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it suffers +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
伊奥贡可对敌人使用{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}把它干掉！{/g}能力。在这种情况下，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降低100%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
目标立即攻击最近的生物（优先攻击其他敌人）。之后，目标所有{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}降低{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}点。受{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}影响的目标陷入{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}状态，持续1轮，除非这是一名强大的敌人。未受钢铁圣所影响的目标则承受1层{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}效果，持续1轮。
每个目标每场战斗只能受此能力影响一次。

languages.text:
エオガンは{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}撃ち倒せ！{/g}アビリティで敵を対象にできる。この場合、彼の{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}士気{/g}が1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間−100%減少する。
対象は直ちに最も近いクリーチャー（他の敵を優先）を攻撃する。その後、対象は全{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}能力値{/g}が−{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714}される。{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}の影響を受けている対象は、強力な敵でない限り1ラウンドの間{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}スタン{/g}状態になる。その影響を受けていない対象は、代わりに1ラウンドの間{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}状態になる。
各対象は、このアビリティの影響を戦闘ごとに1回のみ受ける。
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target enemies with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target immediately attacks the closest creature (prioritising other enemies). Then, the target suffers −{uip|ResolveLowered|b9936af246d44bb19c8bc8167b891714} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g}. A target affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} becomes {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round unless it is a powerful enemy. A target not affected by it becomes {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 1 round instead.
Each target can only be affected by this ability once per combat.
